description_long: This is a single, low-cut lace-up shoe with a rounded toe and a slightly rugged, textured sole. The upper appears to be made of a matte, dark brown suede or nubuck material, with visible stitching along the seams and around the sole. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with four eyelets on each side and matching dark laces. The heel area is reinforced with a rougher, textured overlay, providing additional durability and grip. The interior lining is a lighter color, likely a soft fabric or synthetic material for comfort. The overall design is utilitarian and suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear, showing some signs of light use but maintaining structural integrity.
description: A dark brown, lace-up suede shoe with a rugged sole and reinforced heel, showing light wear and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the lacing system, rounded toe, and light-colored interior lining.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, laces, and overall shape of the shoe.
description_view_2: Side profile displaying the textured sole, stitching, and reinforced heel area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel reinforcement and the back seam of the shoe.
